title: Two Children Die in House Fire
summary: A house fire happened in Wolverhampton on a Friday evening. Firefighters and police came to help. Two young children were inside the house. Firefighters saved them, but sadly, the children could not live. They died at the scene. Two other children and a woman were already outside before the firefighters arrived. They were checked by doctors and were okay. The police are now trying to find out what caused the fire. The house was badly damaged. Everyone is very sad about what happened.

keywords.explanation: when something burns and makes flames
people who stop fires and help people
a sudden, serious situation needing help

options: They were saved and are fine

What are the police doing now?
options: Looking for the cause of the fire
questions.correct_answer: Looking for the cause of the fire

questions.question: How did the house look after the fire?

background_read: A house fire is a very dangerous event. Firefighters wear special clothes and use water to put out fires. They also help rescue people who are trapped. In this sad event, the firefighters tried to save the children, but the fire was too strong. It is important to have smoke alarms at home to warn you if there is a fire.
Article_Structure: WHO: Two young children died, two other children and a woman were safe, firefighters, police, and ambulance staff helped.
WHAT: A house fire happened and two children died.
WHERE: In Wolverhampton, on Mason Street.
WHY: The cause of the fire is still being investigated by police.

perspectives.description: Police are investigating the fire to find out what caused it.
Firefighters rescued the children and gave them emergency care.
